name: dev-kit-app
description: The application family kit for dev-factory — binds the dev-kernel contracts to building and validating application code (capability/protocol cells validated by a passing test suite, not a doc check). Exists primarily to PROVE the kernel/kit boundary (TDD §5): adding a second family required ZERO edits to dev-kernel — a different ontology, rubric manifest, validation harness, and dispatch policy, all bound through the same kernel contracts. Stateless; `check-kit-conform` enforces no kernel forking.
